---
title: "Data from the Clinical Virology Network (CVN)"
subtitle: "A short introduction"
author: "Alex U., Peter P."
format:
  beamer:
    theme: Madrid
    aspectratio: 169
---

## Background

- Bullet point
- Bullet point
- <https://public.clinical-virology.net/>



## Data set

![](../Results/viruses.JPG){fig-align="center" width="80%"}

## Exemplary results for SARS-CoV-2 and Influenza

![](../Results/cvn_plots_infl_sars.png){fig-align="center" width="70%"}

## Comparison with established surveillance systems: Influenza

![](../Results/influenza_comparison_plot.png){fig-align="center" width="80%"}
## Comparison with established surveillance systems: SARS-CoV-2

![](../Results/sars_comparison_plot.png){fig-align="center" width="80%"}
